mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.category, s.address, s.lat, s.lng, s.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, CAST(s.open_time AS CHAR) AS openTime, CAST(s.close_time AS CHAR) AS closeTime FROM stores s WHERE s.id = #{storeId}
SELECT si.image_url FROM store_images si WHERE si.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY si.sort_order ASC, si.created_at ASC
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg, COUNT(*) AS count FROM reviews r WHERE r.store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.original_price AS originalPrice, i.discount_price AS discountPrice, i.discount_rate AS discountRate, i.stock, i.expire_at AS expireAt, i.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl FROM items i WHERE i.store_id = #{storeId} AND i.expire_at > NOW() AND i.stock > 0 ORDER BY i.expire_at ASC
mapper.sql:
(6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{centerLat})) * COS(RADIANS(s.lat)) * COS(RADIANS(s.lng) - RADIANS(#{centerLng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{centerLat})) * SIN(RADIANS(s.lat)) ))
NULL
AS distance_km
s.deleted_at IS NULL AND i.deleted_at IS NULL AND i.stock > 0 AND i.expire_at > NOW()

s.id, s.name, s.lat, s.lng, s.category, TIME_FORMAT(s.close_time, '%H:%i') AS close_time, s.thumbnail_url, SUM(i.stock) AS total_stock, MIN(i.discount_price) AS min_discount_price, MIN(i.original_price) AS min_original_price, MAX(i.discount_rate) AS max_discount_rate

if.test: centerLat != null and centerLng != null and radius != null

mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM stores s INNER JOIN items i ON i.store_id = s.id WHERE
GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.lat, s.lng, s.category, s.close_time, s.thumbnail_url ORDER BY total_stock ASC, min_discount_price ASC

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.category, s.address, s.lat, s.lng, TIME_FORMAT(s.open_time, '%H:%i') AS open_time, TIME_FORMAT(s.close_time, '%H:%i') AS close_time, s.thumbnail_url, ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS review_count,
CASE WHEN f.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS favorited
FALSE AS favorited
FROM stores s LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.store_id = s.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN favorites f ON f.store_id = s.id AND f.member_id = #{memberId}
WHERE s.id = #{storeId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY s.id
SELECT image_url FROM store_images WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT id, name, original_price, discount_price, discount_rate, stock, DATE_FORMAT(expire_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS expire_at, thumbnail_url FROM items WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND stock > 0 AND expire_at > NOW() ORDER BY stock ASC, expire_at ASC

SELECT id, owner_id, name, business_number, category, address, lat, lng, open_time, close_time, thumbnail_url, info, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM stores WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, owner_id, name, business_number, category, address, lat, lng, open_time, close_time, thumbnail_url, info, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM stores WHERE id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stores (owner_id, name, business_number, category, address, lat, lng, open_time, close_time, thumbnail_url, info) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{name}, #{businessNumber}, #{category}, #{address}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{info}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), category = VALUES(category), address = VALUES(address), lat = VALUES(lat), lng = VALUES(lng), open_time = VALUES(open_time), close_time = VALUES(close_time), thumbnail_url = VALUES(thumbnail_url), info = VALUES(info), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE stores SET address = #{address}, lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, store_id, image_url, sort_order, created_at FROM store_images WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_images (store_id, image_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT business_number, store_name AS name, address, last_name, first_name FROM mock_business_registry WHERE business_number = #{businessNumber} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
